text: - `/` fuzzy search across handle, title, activity, workspace/channel, host, cwd, and transport. [...] Assistant: I found the mismatch in code: it explicitly enters the alternate screen and carries pane attachment/input forwarding—far beyond the checklist interaction you described. The correction will delete that whole session-TUI layer and use the repository’s existing `inquire` prompt stack: type-to-filter, arrows to move, Space to toggle, Enter to submit, then an explicit kill confirmation.
